name: tree-sitter-lish
description: tree-sitter grammars for the lish language (.lish expressions and .lishmacro macro modules)

scripts.generate: cd lish && tree-sitter generate && cd ../lishmacro && tree-sitter generate
scripts.test: cd lish && tree-sitter test && cd ../lishmacro && tree-sitter test && cd .. && node test/scanner-corpus.test.js
